_comment: Pre-populated Zenodo deposit metadata draft for the unsolved-relay K_0 manuscript. NO deposit has been executed; this file is the operator-reviewable substrate. Conforms to Zenodo deposit JSON schema (https://developers.zenodo.org/#deposit-metadata). Field decisions flagged with _decision_<name>_ comments are operator-gated (both resolved 2026-05-17; see updated _decision_*_resolution fields below).
_deposit_method: Option β manual web UI per operator directive 2026-05-17 ~07:23 JST (no Zenodo API token in environment)
_deposit_revision_lineage: rev 3 = publish; rev 4 = post-publish metadata edit (operator added ORCID to creator record + removed typo'd code:codeRepository URL from custom block)
_post_deposit_audit_summary: 13 fields PASS; 5 defects flagged; 1 operator-edit round resolved Defect 2 (ORCID linkage, highest priority per D-zenodo-orcid-pseudonymity-stance) and Defect 4 partial (typo URL); 3 defects accepted as operator preferences (creator-name rendering, affiliation form, residual custom fields); 2 LOW defects (MSC2020 absent, related-ID resource_type auto-expansion) acceptable.

metadata.title: A bounded two-tier null result for integer relations on a hybrid Khinchin-K_0 basis, with a structural gap
metadata.description: A bounded null result on integer relations in a hybrid basis built from Khinchin's constant K_0, its low-order powers, log K_0, and bilinear products of K_0 with seven named constants {pi, e, ln 2, gamma, zeta(2), zeta(3), G}. Sixty-five sub-bases are tested under a two-tier predicate: a rigorous Euclidean-norm bound H_rig = 1.0361 * 10^72 derived from Ferguson-Bailey-Arno 1999 Theorem 1 + Corollary 2 at verification class proven_corollary, and an empirical operational bound H_empop ~ 8 * 10^69 at the primary basis under verification class field_standard_practice per Bailey 1998 section 2's general rule. The M3.1 harness uses mpmath PSLQ with cascading-precision triage (P, 2P, 4P at P = 2160 digits) and an independent PARI/GP lindep second leg. Every sub-basis returns cascade-stable null. The mission also documents a fundamental capability gap at the symbolic-closure stage M4 (K_0's transcendence status is the major open question; seven candidate structural arguments and a four-path SymPy probe each fail), and a Lean 4 statement-shape encoding (~385 lines, Mathlib v4.14.0) which type-checks against an explicit auxiliary-axiom set. The work is conducted under an explicit-evidence-acceptance-and-logging (AEAL) discipline with eleven named heuristics, six audited halt events, and twelve mutation-log entries.

creators.name: Papanokechi
creators._decision_orcid_pseudonymity_stance_reso: D-zenodo-orcid-pseudonymity-stance RESOLVED 2026-05-17 by operator: KEEP ORCID linked on byline. Rationale: linking ORCID across publications builds citation-graph density and reduces friction toward future institutional-affiliation acquisition. Retroactive update on prior Zenodo deposits (Items 5/13/28) for ORCID consistency flagged as optional follow-up workstream; does not gate M6 deposit fire.

metadata._license_rationale: The manuscript is the document deposit (CC-BY-4.0 by convention). Note: the repository papanokechi/khinchin-k0-bounded carries MIT for code and CC-BY-4.0 for docs per env/M1.lock; Zenodo deposit is the document, so CC-BY-4.0 applies.

related_identifiers._decision_related_identifiers_siarc_umbr: D-zenodo-related-identifiers RESOLVED 2026-05-17 by operator: KEEP SIARC umbrella concept DOI placeholder. Rationale: related-identifier linkage to the SIARC umbrella concept DOI lets readers find the methodological context for the paper; alternative loses scholarly hygiene without offsetting benefit.

_canonical_artifact_hashes_for_reproduci._comment: These hashes are not Zenodo metadata fields but the operator-facing audit trail. They reproduce paper/main.tex Appendix A's SHA-256 table.
_canonical_artifact_hashes_for_reproduci.manuscript_HEAD_at_deposit_draft_lineage: e0defff (creation) -> 8ac5bcf (M6 layer-1 bundle) -> 979c613 (layer-3 leading-c + precision) -> 8fdd2fa (layer-3 supplemental: H11 install per Option I) -> b7e67ad (layer-4: H11 propagation bundle + manuscript halt-vs-proactive disambiguation)

metadata.notes: This deposit reflects the manuscript draft at HEAD b7e67ad (M6 post-bundle: layer-1 + layer-3 + layer-3 supplemental H11 install + layer-4 H11 propagation). The canonical artifacts repository at https://github.com/papanokechi/khinchin-k0-bounded carries the full reproducibility chain (env/M1.lock pinning Lean 4.14.0, Mathlib v4.14.0, mpmath 1.3.0, PARI/GP 2.18.1; harness/sweep_output/ canonical JSONLs; literature/claims.jsonl 20 paper-read or canonically-confirmed claims; mutation_log/ 12 entries audit trail). The mission is conducted under the AEAL discipline; for the methodological context, see paper/main.tex Appendix B and handoff/agent_health_score.md.

_zenodo_deposit_actions_EXECUTED_manuall._comment: Deposit fired 2026-05-17 via Zenodo web UI (Option β) per operator directive. The Zenodo API was NOT used (no PAT in environment); operator executed the equivalent of these steps manually at https://zenodo.org/deposit/new.
_zenodo_deposit_actions_EXECUTED_manuall.step_2_upload_files: EXECUTED manually 2026-05-17 (8 files uploaded: main.pdf + main.tex + references.bib + preflight_compliance.md + M1.lock + m32a_primary_cascade.jsonl + m32b_empirical_sweep.jsonl + claims.jsonl; ~1.16 MB total)
_zenodo_deposit_actions_EXECUTED_manuall.step_3_apply_metadata: EXECUTED manually 2026-05-17 (metadata entered from this JSON's metadata block)
_zenodo_deposit_actions_EXECUTED_manuall.step_4_publish: EXECUTED manually 2026-05-17 (Publish button clicked; minted DOIs returned)
_zenodo_deposit_actions_EXECUTED_manuall.step_5_dois_minted: Concept-DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20246707; version-DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20246708; both resolve at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20246707 and https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20246708

_post_deposit_operator_actions._comment: After (if) the operator approves the deposit and the publish step succeeds, the operator's follow-up steps per Brief section M6.2 are:
_post_deposit_operator_actions.step_a_record_doi_in_repo: Add the minted version-DOI to env/M1.lock and to paper/main.tex Appendix A.
_post_deposit_operator_actions.step_b_apply_gold_M6_tag: git tag -a gold/M6 -m 'M6 closed: manuscript deposited at DOI <new-doi>' <commit> ; git push origin gold/M6
_post_deposit_operator_actions.step_c_update_handoff_summary: Fill the [STRUCTURE-PLACEHOLDER] in handoff/summary.md section 1 (plain-language summary) and the [OPERATOR-DECIDES] block in section 3 (next venue).
_post_deposit_operator_actions.step_d_close_mission: Per Brief section M7 if applicable; mission moves to post-mission state.
